metadata.data_source: attack-flow-corpus + mitre-stix + lolbas + gtfobins + sigma + expert-fallback
metadata.description: Technique-level causal graph. Edges from ATT&CK Flow corpus + expert fallback; boundary_prior uses LOLBAS (Windows) and GTFOBins (Linux) benign rules; Sigma provides log-source visibility mapping only.

T1547.011.name: Boot or Logon Autostart Execution: Plist Modification

T1036.005.name: Match Legitimate Resource Name or Location

T1070.001.name: Indicator Removal: Clear Windows Event Logs

T1562.001.name: Impair Defenses: Disable or Modify Tools

T1574.007.name: Path Interception by PATH Environment Variable

T1685.001.name: Disable or Modify Windows Event Log

T1195.001.name: Compromise Software Dependencies and Development Tools

T1685.004.name: Disable or Modify Linux Audit System Log

T1070.007.name: Clear Network Connection History and Configurations

T1574.008.name: Path Interception by Search Order Hijacking

T1685.006.name: Clear Linux or Mac System Logs

T1557.001.name: Name Resolution Poisoning and SMB Relay

T1175.name: Component Object Model and Distributed COM

T1048.001.name: Exfiltration Over Symmetric Encrypted Non-C2 Protocol

T1048.002.name: Exfiltration Over Asymmetric Encrypted Non-C2 Protocol
